sender_name.description: Full name of the student sending the email. Used to address the student personally in the response.

sender_email.description: Email address of the student sending the query. Used to identify who to reply to.

email_subject.description: Subject line of the incoming student email. Provides context about the topic of the question.

email_body.description: Full body content of the student's email. Contains the actual question or issue that needs to be addressed.

email_id.description: Unique identifier of the incoming email. Used to track and reference the specific email being processed.
